title: Buttondown vs Campaign Monitor (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Buttondown and Campaign Monitor: pricing, features, and which email marketing tool suits your needs.
h1: Buttondown vs Campaign Monitor: Detailed Comparison
intro: Buttondown and Campaign Monitor serve different email marketing needs. Buttondown appeals to developers and independent writers with its markdown-first approach and freemium model, while Campaign Monitor targets agencies and larger teams managing multiple brands with advanced design and automation tools. This guide compares both platforms to help you choose the right fit.
choose_a_if: You want to start for free with up to 100 subscribers
You prefer writing in markdown or need direct API access
You're an independent creator, developer, or technical writer
choose_b_if: You manage multiple brands or client accounts
You need advanced design capabilities and journey automation
You're willing to pay for more robust analytics and transactional email features

faq.q: Is Buttondown better than Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. Buttondown excels for solo creators and developers with its freemium pricing and markdown support, scoring 4.8 on G2. Campaign Monitor is better for agencies managing multiple brands, though it has lower ratings (4.1 on G2). Choose based on your team size and workflow preferences.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Buttondown or Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: Buttondown is significantly cheaper, offering a free tier for up to 100 subscribers and plans starting at $9/month. Campaign Monitor has no free option and starts at $11/month. For small newsletters, Buttondown can cost nothing, making it the clear budget winner.

faq.q: Can I switch from Campaign Monitor to Buttondown?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support import/export functionality. Buttondown offers data export, and Campaign Monitor allows you to export your subscriber lists and content. The transition is relatively straightforward for most users, though you may need to recreate some automation workflows.
